title: epistemos.episode.v1
description: CoALA-style timestamped episodic memory entry. One row = one user-or-agent event the system might want to recall later by time/place/topic. Stored append-only in the episodic ledger. Schema-validated writes flow through MutationEnvelope. Recall via memory.episodic_recall tool (MAS bounded mutation allowlist: action=add/replace/remove/read).

occurred_at.description: When the event occurred (ISO 8601). Different from recorded_at which may lag.

recorded_at.description: When this episode was written to the ledger.

content.description: Short natural-language summary of what happened. NOT the full payload — that lives in the linked artifacts.

vault_path.description: Vault-relative path of the note this episode is anchored to, if any.

chat_id.description: Chat session id if the episode happened in chat.

tool_call_id.description: AgentEvent / RunEventLog id linking to provenance ledger.

location.description: User-provided or system-inferred location tag (e.g. 'home', 'office'). Optional.

salience.description: TF-IDF + user-engagement-derived salience score in [0,1]. Used by memory.score budget allocation.

linked_episodes.description: A-MEM-style memory-evolution links (arxiv:2502.12110) to other episodes for graph-walk recall.
